summary: Tested AI Career OS backend (15 pytest cases, 13 pass, 1 skip, 1 transient fail) and full frontend flows (Login, Dashboard, Jobs, JobDetail+AI Match, Emails, Insights, Profile, Coach). Sidebar streak/XP visible (1 day, 30 XP, Lv1). AI Match returned real Claude analysis (score 92, decision APPLY).

critical.issue: Returns 500 on first call due to ObjectId serialization (insert_one mutates dict adding _id, then returned via FastAPI -> 'ObjectId is not iterable'). Subsequent calls succeed because docs are re-fetched. Affects new users.

issues: Console warning: 'No routes matched location /login' — Login page renders at / but /login throws router warning

action_items: Fix ObjectId serialization in routes_gamification missions endpoint: pop '_id' after insert or query back with projection {'_id':0} before returning.
Add /login route to React Router or redirect to / to clear console warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Several routes return Mongo docs directly after insert_one without stripping _id; same ObjectId bug pattern likely exists in other endpoints (audit routes_gamification, routes_emails).
auth.py correctly uses {'_id':0} projection — good pattern to replicate.
Heuristic LLM fallbacks in routes_jobs.compute_match are well-designed.
seed_data_creation: Called POST /api/seed-me to populate emails+CV for test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: After main agent fixes ObjectId bug in /api/missions/today, re-run pytest backend_test.py. All other endpoints (auth, jobs, match, applications, recommendations, emails, classify, coach, insights, profile) verified working with real LLM responses.
